```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_adult_aP1NP_boot', reuse=TRUE)

## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)

suppl_table_140 <- kbl(res, caption = 
                        "Suppl. Table 140. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of log2(procollagen type I level). CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "(A) 20th quantile" = 4, 
                     "(B) Median" = 4, "(C) 80th quantile" = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_140
```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(type = 'adult', include=c("aSUP_Ca", "aSUP_D"),
                  exclude = c("SEX"))

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(type = 'adult',include=c("aSUP_Ca", "aSUP_D"),
                   exclude = c("GRP"))

### model without other
mod_other_cov <- rqfit(type = 'adult')

### model without age
mod_age <-  rqfit(type = 'adult',include=c("aSUP_Ca", "aSUP_D"),
                   exclude = c("aAGE"))

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_adult <- add_AIC_adult(AIC_adult)

diet_adult <- add_eff(diet_adult, res)

i = i+1
```

### aUI

Data selection

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=7, collapse=TRUE}

## data selection
column_name <- names(dat_adult)[i+ni]

#AIC_adult$outcome[i] <- column_name

dat_mod <- dat_adult %>%
  mutate(outcome = !!sym(column_name)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(outcome)) 

column_name
```

GAMM

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

gamm <- gam(
  outcome ~ 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs="re"), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)

plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Again but with log2-transformed outcome

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

gamm <- gam(
  log2(outcome) ~ 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs="re"), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)

plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Log-transformation did not improve the fit substantially. Even though it is not perfect we will continue to work with original values.

Quantile model

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

## main model 
mod_main <- rqfit(type = 'adult')

## bootstrapping of main model
mod_boot <- run(
  clust_boot(mod_main, seed= 16, R = nsim),
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_adult_aUI_boot', reuse=TRUE)

## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)

suppl_table_141 <- kbl(res, caption = 
                        "Suppl. Table 141. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of log2(urinary iodine level). CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "(A) 20th quantile" = 4, 
                     "(B) Median" = 4, "(C) 80th quantile" = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_141
```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(type = 'adult',
                  exclude = c("SEX"))

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(type = 'adult',
                   exclude = c("GRP"))

### model without other
mod_other_cov <- NA

### model without age
mod_age <-  rqfit(type = 'adult',
                  exclude = c("aAGE"))

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_adult <- add_AIC_adult(AIC_adult)

diet_adult <- add_eff(diet_adult, res)

i = i+1
```

### aUREA

Data selection

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=7, collapse=TRUE}

## data selection
column_name <- names(dat_adult)[i+ni]

#AIC_adult$outcome[i] <- column_name

dat_mod <- dat_adult %>%
  mutate(outcome = !!sym(column_name)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(outcome))

column_name
```

GAMM

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

gamm <- gam(
  outcome ~ 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs="re"), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)

plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Again but with log2-transformed outcome

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

gamm <- gam(
  log2(outcome) ~ 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs="re"), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)

plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Log-transformation improved the fit. We will continue to work with log-transformed values.

Quantile model

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}
dat_mod$outcome <- log2(dat_mod$outcome)
column_name <- paste0("log2_", column_name)

## main model 
mod_main <- rqfit(type = 'adult')

## bootstrapping of main model
mod_boot <- run(
  clust_boot(mod_main, seed= 16, R = nsim),
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_adult_aUREA_boot', reuse=TRUE)

## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)

suppl_table_142 <- kbl(res, caption = 
                        "Suppl. Table 142. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of log2(urea level). CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "(A) 20th quantile" = 4, 
                     "(B) Median" = 4, "(C) 80th quantile" = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_142
```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(type = 'adult',
                  exclude = c("SEX"))

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(type = 'adult',
                   exclude = c("GRP"))

### model without other
mod_other_cov <- NA

### model without age
mod_age <-  rqfit(type = 'adult',
                   exclude = c("aAGE"))

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_adult <- add_AIC_adult(AIC_adult)

diet_adult <- add_eff(diet_adult, res)

i = i+1
```

### aCREA

Data selection

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=7, collapse=TRUE}

## data selection
column_name <- names(dat_adult)[i+ni]

#AIC_adult$outcome[i] <- column_name

dat_mod <- dat_adult %>%
  mutate(outcome = !!sym(column_name)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(outcome))

column_name
```

GAMM

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

gamm <- gam(
  outcome ~ 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs="re"), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)

plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Again but with log2-transformed outcome

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

gamm <- gam(
  log2(outcome) ~ 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs="re"), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)

plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Log-transformation improved the fit. We will continue to work with log-transformed values.

Quantile model

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

dat_mod$outcome <- log2(dat_mod$outcome)
column_name <- paste0("log2_", column_name)

## main model 
mod_main <- rqfit(type = 'adult')

## bootstrapping of main model
mod_boot <- run(
  clust_boot(mod_main, seed= 16, R = nsim),
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_adult_aCREA_boot', reuse=TRUE)

## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)

suppl_table_143 <- kbl(res, caption = 
                        "Suppl. Table 143. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of log2(creatinine level). CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "(A) 20th quantile" = 4, 
                     "(B) Median" = 4, "(C) 80th quantile" = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_143
```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(type = 'adult',
                  exclude = c("SEX"))

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(type = 'adult',
                   exclude = c("GRP"))

### model without other
mod_other_cov <- NA

### model without age
mod_age <-  rqfit(type = 'adult',
                   exclude = c("aAGE"))

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_adult <- add_AIC_adult(AIC_adult)

diet_adult <- add_eff(diet_adult, res)

i = i+1
```

### aUA

Data selection

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=7, collapse=TRUE}

## data selection
column_name <- names(dat_adult)[i+ni]

#AIC_adult$outcome[i] <- column_name

dat_mod <- dat_adult %>%
  mutate(outcome = !!sym(column_name)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(outcome))

column_name
```

GAMM

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

gamm <- gam(
  outcome ~ 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs="re"), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)

plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Quantile model

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

## main model 
mod_main <- rqfit(type = 'adult')

## bootstrapping of main model
mod_boot <- run(
  clust_boot(mod_main, seed= 16, R = nsim),
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_adult_aUA_boot', reuse=TRUE)

## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)

suppl_table_144 <- kbl(res, caption = 
                        "Suppl. Table 144. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of uric acid level. CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "(A) 20th quantile" = 4, 
                     "(B) Median" = 4, "(C) 80th quantile" = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_144
```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(type = 'adult',
                  exclude = c("SEX"))

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(type = 'adult',
                   exclude = c("GRP"))

### model without other
mod_other_cov <- NA

### model without age
mod_age <-  rqfit(type = 'adult',
                   exclude = c("aAGE"))

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_adult <- add_AIC_adult(AIC_adult)

diet_adult <- add_eff(diet_adult, res)

i = i+1
```

### aVIT_AKTB12

Data selection

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=7, collapse=TRUE}

## data selection
column_name <- names(dat_adult)[i+ni]

#AIC_adult$outcome[i] <- column_name

dat_mod <- dat_adult %>%
  mutate(outcome = !!sym(column_name)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(outcome),
         !is.na(aSup_B12)) 

column_name
```

GAMM

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

gamm <- gam(
  outcome ~ 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    aSup_B12 + 
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs="re"), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)

plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Again but with log2-transformed outcome

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

gamm <- gam(
  log2(outcome) ~ 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    aSup_B12 + 
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs="re"), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)

plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Log-transformation improved the fit. We will continue to work with log-transformed values.

Quantile model

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

dat_mod$outcome <- log2(dat_mod$outcome)
column_name <- paste0("log2_", column_name)

## main model 
mod_main <- rqfit(type = 'adult', include=c("aSup_B12"))

## bootstrapping of main model
mod_boot <- run(
  clust_boot(mod_main, seed= 16, R = nsim),
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_adult_aVIT_AKTB12_boot', reuse=TRUE)

## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)

suppl_table_145 <- kbl(res, caption = 
                        "Suppl. Table 145. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of log2(vitamin B12 level). CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "(A) 20th quantile" = 4, 
                     "(B) Median" = 4, "(C) 80th quantile" = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_145
```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(type = 'adult', include= c("aSup_B12"),
                  exclude = c("SEX"))

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(type = 'adult',include= c("aSup_B12"),
                   exclude = c("GRP"))

### model without other
mod_other_cov <- rqfit(type = 'adult')

### model without age
mod_age <-  rqfit(type = 'adult',include= c("aSup_B12"),
                   exclude = c("aAGE"))

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_adult <- add_AIC_adult(AIC_adult)

diet_adult <- add_eff(diet_adult, res)

i = i+1
```

### aHCY

Data selection

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=7, collapse=TRUE}

## data selection
column_name <- names(dat_adult)[i+ni]

#AIC_adult$outcome[i] <- column_name

dat_mod <- dat_adult %>%
  mutate(outcome = !!sym(column_name)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(outcome))

column_name
```

GAMM

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

gamm <- gam(
  outcome ~ 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs="re"), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)

plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

log2 outcome - not better

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

gamm <- gam(
  log2(outcome) ~ 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs="re"), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)

plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Log-transformation slightly improved the fit. As log2 transformation was used in children category, ee will continue to work with log-transformed values.

Quantile model

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}
dat_mod$outcome <- log2(dat_mod$outcome)
column_name <- paste0("log2_", column_name)
## main model 
mod_main <- rqfit(type = 'adult')

## bootstrapping of main model
mod_boot <- run(
  clust_boot(mod_main, seed= 16, R = nsim),
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_adult_aHCY_boot', reuse=TRUE)

## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)

suppl_table_146 <- kbl(res, caption = 
                        "Suppl. Table 146. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of log2(homocysteine). CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "(A) 20th quantile" = 4, 
                     "(B) Median" = 4, "(C) 80th quantile" = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_146
```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(type = 'adult',
                  exclude = c("SEX"))

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(type = 'adult',
                   exclude = c("GRP"))

### model without other
mod_other_cov <- NA

### model without age
mod_age <-  rqfit(type = 'adult',
                   exclude = c("aAGE"))

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_adult <- add_AIC_adult(AIC_adult)

diet_adult <- add_eff(diet_adult, res)

i = i+1
```

### aMMA

Data selection

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=7, collapse=TRUE}

## data selection
column_name <- names(dat_adult)[i+ni]

#AIC_adult$outcome[i] <- column_name

dat_mod <- dat_adult %>%
  mutate(outcome = !!sym(column_name)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(outcome))

column_name
```

GAMM

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

gamm <- gam(
  outcome ~ 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs="re"), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)

plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Try log2-transformation

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}
gamm <- gam(
  log2(outcome) ~ 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs="re"), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)

plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Much better now

Quantile model

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

## Log-transformation of the outcome
dat_mod$outcome <- log2(dat_mod$outcome)
column_name <- paste0("log2_", column_name)

## main model 
mod_main <- rqfit(type = 'adult')

## bootstrapping of main model
mod_boot <- run(
  clust_boot(mod_main, seed= 16, R = nsim),
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_adult_aMMA_boot', reuse=TRUE)

## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)

suppl_table_147 <- kbl(res, caption = 
                        "Suppl. Table 147. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of methylmalonic acid level. CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "(A) 20th quantile" = 4, 
                     "(B) Median" = 4, "(C) 80th quantile" = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_147
```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(type = 'adult',
                  exclude = c("SEX"))

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(type = 'adult',
                   exclude = c("GRP"))

### model without other
mod_other_cov <- NA

### model without age
mod_age <-  rqfit(type = 'adult',
                   exclude = c("aAGE"))

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_adult <- add_AIC_adult(AIC_adult)

diet_adult <- add_eff(diet_adult, res)

i = i+1
```

### aVIT_D

Data selection

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=7, collapse=TRUE}

## data selection
column_name <- names(dat_adult)[i+ni]

#AIC_adult$outcome[i] <- column_name

dat_mod <- dat_adult %>%
  mutate(outcome = !!sym(column_name)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(outcome),
         !is.na(aSUP_D)) 

column_name
```

GAMM

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

gamm <- gam(
  outcome ~ 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    aSUP_D + 
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs="re"), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)

plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Again but with log2-transformed outcome

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

gamm <- gam(
  log2(outcome) ~ 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    aSUP_D + 
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs="re"), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)

plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Log-transformation improved the fit. We will continue to work with log-transformed values.

Quantile model

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}


dat_mod$outcome <- log2(dat_mod$outcome)
column_name <- paste0("log2_", column_name)

## main model 
mod_main <- rqfit(type = 'adult', include=c("aSUP_D"))

## bootstrapping of main model
mod_boot <- run(
  clust_boot(mod_main, seed= 16, R = nsim),
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_adult_aVIT_D_boot', reuse=TRUE)

## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)

suppl_table_148 <- kbl(res, caption = 
                        "Suppl. Table 148. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of log2(vitamin D level). CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "(A) 20th quantile" = 4, 
                     "(B) Median" = 4, "(C) 80th quantile" = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_148
```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(type = 'adult', include= c("aSUP_D"),
                  exclude = c("SEX"))

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(type = 'adult',include= c("aSUP_D"),
                   exclude = c("GRP"))

### model without other
mod_other_cov <- rqfit(type = 'adult')

### model without age
mod_age <-  rqfit(type = 'adult',include= c("aSUP_D"),
                   exclude = c("aAGE"))

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_adult <- add_AIC_adult(AIC_adult)

diet_adult <- add_eff(diet_adult, res)

i = i+1
```

### aFOLAT

Data selection

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=7, collapse=TRUE}

## data selection
column_name <- names(dat_adult)[i+ni]

#AIC_adult$outcome[i] <- column_name

dat_mod <- dat_adult %>%
  mutate(outcome = !!sym(column_name)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(outcome),
         !is.na(aSUP_FOL)) 

column_name
```

GAMM

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

gamm <- gam(
  outcome ~ 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    aSUP_FOL + 
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs="re"), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)

plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Again but with log2-transformed outcome

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

gamm <- gam(
  log2(outcome) ~ 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    aSUP_FOL + 
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs="re"), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)

plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Log-transformation did not improve the fit substantially. We will continue to work with original values.

Quantile model

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, collapse=TRUE}

## main model 
mod_main <- rqfit(type = 'adult', include=c("aSUP_FOL"))

## bootstrapping of main model
mod_boot <- run(
  clust_boot(mod_main, seed= 16, R = nsim),
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_adult_aFOLAT_boot', reuse=TRUE)

## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)

suppl_table_149 <- kbl(res, caption = 
                        "Suppl. Table 149. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of folate serum level. CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "(A) 20th quantile" = 4, 
                     "(B) Median" = 4, "(C) 80th quantile" = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_149
```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(type = 'adult', include= c("aSUP_FOL"),
                  exclude = c("SEX"))

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(type = 'adult',include= c("aSUP_FOL"),
                   exclude = c("GRP"))

### model without other
mod_other_cov <- rqfit(type = 'adult')

### model without age
mod_age <-  rqfit(type = 'adult',include= c("aSUP_FOL"),
                   exclude = c("aAGE"))

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_adult <- add_AIC_adult(AIC_adult)

diet_adult <- add_eff(diet_adult, res)

i = i+1
```


### Saving tables

```{r}

## Between-diets differences

if(file.exists('gitignore/data/diet_adult.xlsx') == FALSE){
  diet_adult <- diet_adult[-1,]
  
  diet_adult$VN_OM_P_adj <- NA
  diet_adult$VG_OM_P_adj <- NA
  diet_adult$VN_VG_P_adj <- NA
  
for (i in seq(1, nrow(diet_adult), by = 3)) {
  padj <- p.adjust(c(
    diet_adult$VN_OM_P[i], 
    diet_adult$VN_OM_P[i+1],
    diet_adult$VN_OM_P[i+2],
    
    diet_adult$VG_OM_P[i],
    diet_adult$VG_OM_P[i+1],
    diet_adult$VG_OM_P[i+2],
    
    diet_adult$VN_VG_P[i],
    diet_adult$VN_VG_P[i+1],
    diet_adult$VN_VG_P[i+2]), method = 'hochberg')
  
  diet_adult$VN_OM_P_adj[i:(i+2)] <- padj[1:3]
  diet_adult$VG_OM_P_adj[i:(i+2)] <- padj[4:6]
  diet_adult$VN_VG_P_adj[i:(i+2)] <- padj[7:9]
}
  
  
  diet_adult <- diet_adult %>%
    
    select(outcome, estimand, 
         VN_OM_diff, VN_OM_P, VN_OM_P_adj,
         VG_OM_diff, VG_OM_P, VG_OM_P_adj,
         VN_VG_diff, VN_VG_P, VN_VG_P_adj) %>%
    
    mutate(across(.cols = 3:11, .fns = ~as.numeric(as.character(.)))) %>% 
    mutate(across(.cols = c(VN_OM_P, VG_OM_P, VN_VG_P,
                            VN_OM_P_adj, VG_OM_P_adj, VN_VG_P_adj), ~ round(.x, 5)))

  write.xlsx(diet_adult, 'gitignore/data/diet_adult.xlsx')
}

## Importance of predictors

if(file.exists('gitignore/data/AIC_adult.xlsx') == FALSE){
  AIC_adult <- AIC_adult[-1,]
  write.xlsx(AIC_adult, 'gitignore/data/AIC_adult.xlsx')
  }
```

# Reproducibility

```{r, collapse=TRUE}
sessionInfo()
```
